title: Benzodiazepine-sparing sedation in adult neurocritical care: effects on delirium and mechanical ventilation outcomes
author: Putra, I Made Prema
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Full protocol for a systematic review and meta-analysis on benzodiazepine-sparing sedation strategies in neurocritical care. Databases planned: MEDLINE/PubMed, Embase, CENTRAL, and Scopus (search dates will be reported in the review). Study selection, data extraction, and risk-of-bias assessment will be performed by at least two independent reviewers (RoB 2 for RCTs; ROBINS-I for non-randomized studies). Certainty of evidence will be assessed using GRADE, and reporting will follow PRISMA 2020. PROSPERO registration: CRD420261300504. Protocol version: 1.0
